title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Don Chinjao, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #2 as the Colosseum fighters, Tontatta rebellion, and Straw Hat alliance move closer to the same target: Doflamingo’s hidden system.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I can see it, right there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: My whole life's work!! My great fortune!!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Even until our grandchildren's generation... I won't forgive you, Garp!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So I ABAN- DONED piracy!!! My strength was gone, my fortune lost, and my heart broken.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Am I hal- Lucinat- ing!!? Is that...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lucy's arm... seems to have become that of a giant!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll take the life of your precious grandson!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Atone!!! With just one punch to the head, your grand- father stole away everything I had!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've taken more of those punches than I can count!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Even the marrow in your bones will be ground down to dust!!

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
